rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §37.107, which criminalizes trespass on school grounds. No overlap in subject matter, authority, or operation.
quote: Sec. 37.107. TRESPASS ON SCHOOL GROUNDS. An unauthorized person who trespasses on the grounds of any school district of this state commits an offense.
_note: No conflict detected; the rule text concerns criminal trespass on school grounds and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
